title: pseudoraphis abortiva
intro: Pseudoraphis abortiva, also known as false joint grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pseudoraphis abortiva include relief from fever, headaches, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce pain and swelling. Pseudoraphis abortiva can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and its roots can be dried and used in powder form for medicinal purposes.
